body:
## Summary

This PR connects the fantasy lobby flow to the currently playable PvE game page and fixes several UI/gameplay issues blocking navigation.

### Changes
- Connected "Start Solo PvE" button from LobbyPage to GamePage
- Fixed broken `SkillButton` reference in `SkillBar.jsx`
- Removed duplicated shield skill block
- Restored missing top decorative asset in skill bar
- Updated lobby navigation flow to directly launch the playable local PvE game
- Verified frontend build passes successfully

### UI / Gameplay
- Players can now enter the game directly from the lobby
- Fixed runtime errors preventing game startup
- Improved consistency between lobby and gameplay navigation flow

### Notes
- Current gameplay is still frontend local logic
- No backend PvE save/load integration yet
- Match history / leaderboard backend support is still limited to:
  - total wins
  - total games
  - win rate
- Multiplayer and socket synchronization remain future work
title: feat: connect lobby start button to playable game page
